sector: Apparel Design, Pattern Making & Fashion Technology

questions.question: Fashion Illustration ka main purpose kya hai?

options.B: Sirf art gallery mein display karna
options.C: Kapde silne ke liye measurements lena

questions.explanation: Fashion illustration ka primary goal hai design ideas aur garments ko visually communicate karna designers aur clients tak.

questions.question: Ek fashion illustrator ke liye sabse basic drawing tool kaun sa hai?

options.B: Measuring tape

questions.explanation: Pencil drawing ka sabse basic aur fundamental tool hai, jisse initial sketches banaye jaate hain.

questions.question: Croquis kya hota hai fashion illustration mein?

options.B: Human figure ka stylised sketch

questions.explanation: Croquis ek stylised human figure ka sketch hota hai, jo fashion designs ko present karne ke liye base ke roop mein use hota hai.

questions.question: Watercolors ka use fashion illustration mein kis liye kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Soft aur translucent color effects dene ke liye
options.C: Garments ko stitch karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Watercolors soft, translucent aur vibrant color effects dene ke liye popular hain, jo fabric textures ko achhe se represent karte hain.

questions.question: Fashion figure ko generally kitne 'heads' mein divide kiya jaata hai?

options.B: 7 heads

questions.explanation: Fashion illustration mein figure ko normally 9 heads mein divide kiya jaata hai taaki exaggerated aur elegant proportion dikhaye ja sakein.

questions.question: Kaisa paper fashion illustration ke liye sabse suitable hai agar aap markers use kar rahe hain?

options.B: Thin printer paper

questions.explanation: Bleed-proof marker paper markers ke ink ko spread hone se rokta hai aur colours ko vibrant dikhata hai.

questions.question: Ek fashion sketch mein 'action line' ka kya role hai?

options.A: Garment ke seams ko indicate karna
options.B: Figure ki movement aur balance ko show karna

questions.explanation: Action line figure ki overall pose, movement aur balance ko establish karti hai, jisse sketch mein fluidity aati hai.

questions.question: Jo illustrations technical details aur construction methods par focus karte hain, unhe kya kehte hain?

options.B: Technical flats

questions.explanation: Technical flats ya flat sketches garment ke precise construction details aur proportions ko front, back aur side views mein dikhate hain.

questions.question: Fashion illustration mein 'rendering' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Colors, shadows aur highlights add karke sketch ko realistic banana

questions.explanation: Rendering ka matlab hai colors, shading, highlights aur textures add karke illustration ko complete aur realistic appearance dena.

questions.question: Ek 'fashion board' par illustrations ko present karne ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Ek cohesive collection ya concept ko showcase karna
options.C: Pattern making ke liye use karna

questions.explanation: Fashion board par multiple illustrations aur related elements (swatches, mood images) ek saath display karke ek cohesive story ya collection present ki jaati hai.

questions.question: Koun sa tool ek sharp, clean line create karne ke liye best hai?

options.B: Ink pen

questions.explanation: Ink pens, especially fine-liner pens, sharp aur precise lines banane ke liye ideal hote hain.

questions.question: Fashion illustration mein 'perspective' ka kya importance hai?

options.B: Depth aur three-dimensionality create karna

questions.explanation: Perspective illustration mein depth aur realism add karta hai, jisse objects aur figure space mein sahi dikhte hain.

questions.question: Koun sa drawing medium blend karna aur soft transitions create karna mushkil hai?

options.B: Colored pencils

questions.explanation: Alcohol-based markers jaldi dry hote hain, jiski wajah se smooth blends aur soft transitions create karna challenging ho sakta hai, especially for beginners.

questions.question: Fashion illustration mein 'thumbnail sketches' ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Quickly multiple ideas aur compositions explore karna

questions.explanation: Thumbnail sketches chhote, rough drawings hote hain jo initial ideas, poses aur compositions ko quickly explore karne mein help karte hain.

questions.question: Ek fashion designer apni initial design concepts ko communicate karne ke liye kya use karta hai?

options.B: Detailed technical specification sheet

questions.explanation: Fashion illustration initial design concepts ko visually present aur communicate karne ka sabse effective tareeka hai.

questions.question: Koun sa tool shading aur texture create karne ke liye 'smudging' technique ke saath use kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Watercolor paint

questions.explanation: Charcoal ek versatile medium hai jo dark tones, soft blends aur textures create karne ke liye smudging ke saath use hota hai.

questions.question: Fashion illustration mein 'line quality' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Lines ka color

questions.explanation: Line quality refer karta hai lines ki varied thickness, darkness aur consistency ko, jo sketch mein depth, movement aur detail add karti hai.

questions.question: Human anatomy draw karte samay 'balance line' ka kya role hai?

options.B: Figure ke weight aur pose ko distribute karna
options.D: Fabric ke texture ko show karna

questions.explanation: Balance line figure ke weight distribution aur pose ko establish karti hai, jisse figure stable aur natural dikhta hai.

questions.question: 9-head fashion figure mein waist line generally kahan par hoti hai?

options.B: 3rd head mark par

questions.explanation: Standard 9-head fashion figure mein, waist line approximately 4th head mark par hoti hai.

questions.question: Croquis draw karte samay, shoulders ki width generally kitni hoti hai?

options.B: 1.5 head width

questions.explanation: Fashion croquis mein shoulders ki width generally 2 heads ke barabar hoti hai, jo ek elegant aur broad look deta hai.

questions.question: 'Gesture drawing' ka main focus kya hai?

options.B: Figure ki movement aur energy ko capture karna

questions.explanation: Gesture drawing ka goal hai figure ki overall movement, action aur energy ko quickly capture karna, na ki precise details.

questions.question: Fashion croquis mein legs ki length body ke proportion mein kaisi hoti hai?

options.B: Body ke barabar

questions.explanation: Fashion croquis mein legs ko often exaggeratedly lamba banaya jaata hai taaki ek elegant aur elongated silhouette mile.

questions.question: Hip line generally 9-head figure mein kahan par hoti hai?

options.B: 3rd head mark

questions.explanation: Hip line 9-head fashion figure mein approximately 5th head mark par hoti hai.

questions.question: Ek 'S-curve' fashion illustration mein kya represent karta hai?

options.B: Figure mein dynamic movement aur grace

questions.explanation: S-curve ek natural aur graceful pose ko represent karta hai, jisme figure ka weight ek hip par shift hota hai aur shoulder line opposite direction mein tilt hoti hai.

questions.question: Hands aur feet ko draw karte samay, simplification ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Realistic details ki jagah basic shapes aur forms use karna

questions.explanation: Simplification ka matlab hai complex details ko basic geometric shapes mein reduce karna, taaki overall form capture ho sake bina over-detailing ke.

questions.question: Fashion croquis mein head ka size body ke comparison mein kaisa hota hai?

options.B: Thoda chhota aur elongated

questions.explanation: Fashion croquis mein head ko generally thoda chhota aur elongated banaya jaata hai taaki figure ki height aur elegance highlight ho.

questions.question: Ek 'front view' croquis mein figure ke kaun se parts dikhte hain?

options.B: Poora front portion

questions.explanation: Front view croquis mein figure ka poora front portion dikhta hai, jo garment design ke liye basic canvas provide karta hai.

questions.question: Knees generally 9-head figure mein kahan par hoti hain?

options.B: 6th head mark

questions.explanation: Knees 9-head fashion figure mein approximately 6th head mark par hoti hain.

questions.question: Fashion illustration mein 'contrapposto' pose ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Ek natural, relaxed pose jahan weight ek leg par hota hai

questions.explanation: Contrapposto ek classic art pose hai jisme figure ka weight ek leg par hota hai, jisse shoulder aur hip lines opposite directions mein tilt hoti hain, creating a natural 'S' curve aur dynamic balance.

questions.question: Jab aap ek 'back view' croquis draw karte hain, toh kaun se details par zyada focus hota hai?

options.B: Back seams, necklines aur closures

questions.explanation: Back view croquis mein garment ke back details jaise seams, necklines, closures, aur back pockets par focus hota hai.

questions.question: Fashion figure draw karte samay 'proportion' ka kya importance hai?

options.B: Figure ke parts ke relative sizes aur relationships ko maintain karna

questions.explanation: Proportion figure ke various parts ke beech sahi size aur scale ka relation maintain karta hai, jisse figure balanced aur aesthetically pleasing dikhta hai.

questions.question: Elbows generally 9-head figure mein kahan par hoti hain?

options.B: 4th head mark (waist line ke paas)

questions.explanation: Elbows 9-head fashion figure mein approximately 4th head mark par, yaani waist line ke paas hoti hain.

questions.question: Ek 'side view' croquis kis liye useful hota hai?

options.A: Garment ke front details dikhane ke liye
options.B: Garment ke profile, volume aur fit ko demonstrate karne ke liye
options.C: Fabric ki print dikhane ke liye
options.D: Accessories ko highlight karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Side view croquis garment ke profile, side seams, volume aur overall fit ko clearly dikhata hai.

questions.question: Fashion illustration mein 'dynamic pose' kya hota hai?

options.B: Ek pose jisme movement aur energy dikhti hai

questions.explanation: Dynamic pose figure mein movement, energy aur action ko convey karta hai, jo garment ko more lively aur attractive banata hai.

questions.question: Ek 'peter pan collar' ki khaas baat kya hai?

options.B: Rounded edges hote hain jo garment par flat lay karte hain
options.C: Stiff aur stand-up collar hota hai

questions.explanation: Peter Pan collar apni rounded edges aur flat-laying style ke liye jaana jaata hai, jo ek innocent aur classic look deta hai.

questions.question: Denim fabric ke folds ko draw karte samay kya dikhana important hai?

options.B: Stiff, angular aur structured folds

questions.explanation: Denim ek heavy aur stiff fabric hai, isliye uske folds ko structured, angular aur thoda hard dikhana chahiye.

questions.question: Koun sa neckline shoulders ko expose karta hai aur often off-shoulder style mein hota hai?

options.B: Turtle neck

questions.explanation: Bardot ya off-shoulder neckline shoulders ko expose karta hai, jo ek feminine aur elegant look deta hai.

questions.question: Silk fabric ke drapes ko kaise represent karna chahiye?

options.B: Soft, flowing aur graceful drapes

questions.explanation: Silk ek lightweight aur luxurious fabric hai, isliye uske drapes ko soft, flowing aur graceful dikhana chahiye.

questions.question: Ek 'puffed sleeve' ki khaas baat kya hai?

options.B: Shoulder par volume aur gather hota hai

questions.explanation: Puffed sleeve shoulder par gathers ya pleats se volume create karta hai, jo ek romantic ya playful look deta hai.

questions.question: Leather texture ko illustrate karte samay kya features dikhane chahiye?

options.B: Shiny, smooth surface aur subtle creases

questions.explanation: Leather mein ek distinct shine, smooth surface aur specific creases hoti hain jinko illustration mein capture karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Koun sa skirt style waist se tight hota hai aur neeche ki taraf flare karta hai?

options.B: A-line skirt

questions.explanation: A-line skirt waist par fitted hota hai aur neeche ki taraf 'A' shape mein flare karta hai.

questions.question: 'Gathering' ya 'Shirring' ko illustration mein kaise dikhate hain?

options.B: Chhote, repetitive folds aur wrinkles se

questions.explanation: Gathering ya shirring fabric mein chhote, repetitive folds aur wrinkles create karta hai, jo illustration mein bhi aise hi dikhaye jaate hain.

questions.question: Wool fabric ke folds ko draw karte samay kya dhyan mein rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Bulky, heavy aur textured folds

questions.explanation: Wool ek heavy aur textured fabric hai, isliye uske folds ko bulky, soft aur thoda fuzzy dikhana chahiye.

questions.question: Ek 'raglan sleeve' ki khaas pehchan kya hai?

options.A: Shoulder seam par attached hota hai
options.B: Neckline se underarm tak ek diagonal seam hoti hai

questions.explanation: Raglan sleeve ki pehchan uski diagonal seam hai jo neckline se underarm tak jaati hai, shoulder seam ko replace karti hai.

questions.question: Koun sa trouser style ankle par narrow hota hai aur fitted look deta hai?

options.B: Bootcut trousers

questions.explanation: Skinny ya slim-fit trousers poore leg par fitted hote hain aur ankle par narrow hote hain.

questions.question: 'Piping' ko fashion illustration mein kaise represent karte hain?

options.B: Garment ke edge par ek thin, raised line se
options.C: Fabric par ek flat print se

questions.explanation: Piping ek decorative detail hai jo garment ke edge par ek thin, corded, raised line ke roop mein dikhata hai.

questions.question: Lace fabric ko illustrate karte samay kya details dikhane zaroori hain?

options.B: Delicate, intricate patterns aur transparency

questions.explanation: Lace apni delicate, intricate patterns aur sheer (transparent) quality ke liye jaana jaata hai, jise illustration mein capture karna important hai.

questions.question: Ek 'cowl neck' ki khaas baat kya hai?

options.B: Draped fabric jo neck par folds banata hai

questions.explanation: Cowl neck mein neckline par loose, draped fabric hota hai jo soft folds create karta hai.

questions.question: Velvet fabric ko render karte samay kya effect dikhana chahiye?

options.B: Shiny, plush surface aur light ke saath color mein variation

questions.explanation: Velvet apni plush, soft pile aur light ke saath color mein aane wale dramatic variations ke liye jaana jaata hai, jise shading aur highlighting se capture karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Ek 'pleated skirt' ko draw karte samay kya dikhana important hai?

options.B: Sharp, uniform folds jo waist se neeche tak jaate hain

questions.explanation: Pleated skirt mein uniform, sharp folds hote hain jo waist se shuru hokar neeche tak jaate hain, aur illustration mein in folds ki consistency dikhana zaroori hai.

questions.question: Koun sa sleeve style wrist par tight hota hai aur forearm par loose hota hai?

options.B: Bishop sleeve

questions.explanation: Bishop sleeve forearm par full aur voluminous hota hai, aur wrist par ek cuff se tight hota hai, jo ek dramatic silhouette deta hai.

questions.question: Primary colors kaun se hain?

options.B: Red, Blue, Yellow

questions.explanation: Red, Blue aur Yellow primary colors hain, jinhe mix karke doosre colors banaye jaate hain.

questions.question: Koun se colors 'warm colors' kehlati hain?

options.B: Red, Orange, Yellow

questions.explanation: Red, Orange aur Yellow warm colors hain, jo energy, passion aur sunshine ko evoke karte hain.

questions.question: Ek 'monochromatic color scheme' mein kya hota hai?

options.B: Ek single color ke alag-alag shades, tints aur tones hote hain
options.D: Sirf black aur white hote hain

questions.explanation: Monochromatic scheme mein ek hi color ke variations use hote hain, jisse ek harmonious aur sophisticated look milta hai.

questions.question: Shading ka main purpose kya hai fashion illustration mein?

options.B: Depth, volume aur form create karna

questions.explanation: Shading illustration mein depth, volume aur three-dimensionality add karta hai, jisse figure aur garment realistic dikhte hain.

questions.question: Complementary colors kaun se hote hain?

options.A: Color wheel par ek doosre ke bagal wale colors
options.B: Color wheel par ek doosre ke opposite wale colors
options.C: Teen colors jo triangle banate hain

questions.explanation: Complementary colors color wheel par ek doosre ke opposite hote hain (jaise Red aur Green, Blue aur Orange), aur together use karne par high contrast create karte hain.

questions.question: Koun sa medium soft, blendable aur velvety finish deta hai?

options.B: Oil pastels

questions.explanation: Oil pastels rich, vibrant colors aur soft, blendable, velvety finish dete hain.

questions.question: Highlights ka kya role hai illustration mein?

options.B: Light source ko indicate karna aur shiny effect dena

questions.explanation: Highlights illustration mein light source ko indicate karte hain aur objects ko shiny, glossy ya three-dimensional appearance dete hain.

questions.question: Analagous color scheme mein kya hota hai?

options.A: Sirf ek color use hota hai
options.B: Color wheel par ek doosre ke bagal wale colors use hote hain

questions.explanation: Analagous colors color wheel par ek doosre ke bagal mein hote hain aur ek harmonious, soothing effect create karte hain.

questions.question: Sequin fabric ko render karte samay kya effect dikhana chahiye?

options.B: Sparkling, reflective aur textured surface

questions.explanation: Sequins light ko reflect karte hain, isliye unhe render karte samay sparkling, reflective patches aur individual sequin shapes dikhana zaroori hai.

questions.question: Koun sa color mix karne se 'secondary colors' bante hain?

options.B: Do Primary colors
options.C: Ek Primary aur ek Secondary color

questions.explanation: Do primary colors ko mix karke secondary colors (Green, Orange, Purple) bante hain.

questions.question: Koun se colors 'cool colors' kehlati hain?

options.B: Blue, Green, Purple

questions.explanation: Blue, Green aur Purple cool colors hain, jo calmness, serenity aur nature ko evoke karte hain.

questions.question: Marker rendering mein 'layering' ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Smooth blends, depth aur rich colors achieve karna

questions.explanation: Markers ko layers mein apply karne se smooth blends, gradients, depth aur vibrant colors create kiye ja sakte hain.

questions.question: Fur texture ko render karte samay kya effect dikhana chahiye?

options.B: Soft, fluffy aur irregular hair strands

questions.explanation: Fur ko render karte samay soft, fluffy, aur irregular hair strands ko dikhana zaroori hai, jo uski natural texture ko capture kare.

questions.question: Ek 'triadic color scheme' kya hoti hai?

options.B: Color wheel par evenly spaced teen colors

questions.explanation: Triadic color scheme mein color wheel par evenly spaced teen colors use hote hain, jaise primary colors (Red, Blue, Yellow), jo vibrant aur balanced look dete hain.

questions.question: Koun sa medium quick drying hota hai aur opaque ya translucent effects de sakta hai?

options.B: Acrylic paint

questions.explanation: Acrylic paints quick drying hote hain aur unhe water se dilute karke translucent ya directly use karke opaque effects diye ja sakte hain.

questions.question: Koun sa color 'neutral color' mana jaata hai?

options.B: Electric Blue

questions.explanation: Grey, Black, White aur Beige jaise colors neutral colors hain, jo doosre colors ke saath achhe se blend hote hain.

questions.question: Fashion illustration mein 'texture rendering' ka kya importance hai?

options.B: Fabric aur surface ki tactile quality ko visually represent karna

questions.explanation: Texture rendering garment ke fabric aur surface ki tactile quality ko capture karta hai, jaise silk ka smoothness ya wool ka fuzziness, jisse illustration more realistic aur appealing lagti hai.

questions.question: Ek 'walking pose' mein figure ko kaise dikhana chahiye?

options.B: Ek pair aage, doosra peeche, aur body mein movement

questions.explanation: Walking pose mein ek pair aage aur doosra peeche hota hai, aur body mein natural movement aur swing dikhaya jaata hai.

questions.question: Fashion illustration mein 'confident mood' dikhane ke liye kaisa pose use karte hain?

options.B: Straight posture, shoulders back, direct gaze

questions.explanation: Confident mood dikhane ke liye figure ko straight posture, shoulders back aur direct gaze ke saath draw kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Ek 'sitting pose' mein kya dhyan rakhna zaroori hai?

options.B: Body ke segments ko proportionally chhota karna
options.C: Gravity aur fabric ke drapes ka impact

questions.explanation: Sitting pose mein gravity ka impact aur fabric ke natural drapes ko sahi tareeke se dikhana zaroori hai taaki pose realistic lage.

questions.question: Fashion illustration mein 'dramatic pose' kis liye use hota hai?

options.A: Garment ko simple dikhane ke liye
options.B: Attention grab karne aur ek strong statement dene ke liye
options.C: Background ko highlight karne ke liye
options.D: Figure ko chhota dikhane ke liye

questions.explanation: Dramatic pose ka use audience ka attention grab karne aur ek strong, memorable statement dene ke liye hota hai.

questions.question: Ek 'casual pose' mein figure ko kaise dikhate hain?

options.B: Relaxed, natural aur informal

questions.explanation: Casual pose mein figure relaxed, natural aur informal dikhta hai, jaise hands in pockets ya ek slight slouch.

questions.question: Accessories jaise handbags aur jewelry ko illustrate karte samay kya focus karna chahiye?

options.B: Unki material, texture aur details

questions.explanation: Accessories ki material, texture aur fine details ko capture karna zaroori hai taaki wo garment ke saath complement karein aur realistic lagein.

questions.question: Ek 'elegant mood' dikhane ke liye figure ke limbs ko kaise draw karna chahiye?

options.B: Graceful curves aur extended lines ke saath

questions.explanation: Elegant mood ke liye limbs ko graceful curves aur extended lines ke saath draw karte hain, jo fluidity aur sophistication dikhata hai.

questions.question: 'Group composition' mein kya challenge hota hai?

options.B: Multiple figures ko balanced aur harmonious tareeke se arrange karna

questions.explanation: Group composition mein multiple figures ko visually interesting, balanced aur harmonious tareeke se arrange karna challenging hota hai, jisme overlapping aur varying poses use hote hain.

questions.question: Ek 'playful mood' dikhane ke liye figure ke facial expression aur body language kaisi honi chahiye?

options.B: Smiling, light-hearted, energetic poses

questions.explanation: Playful mood ke liye smiling facial expression, light-hearted body language aur energetic poses use kiye jaate hain.

questions.question: Footwear ko illustrate karte samay kya details important hain?

options.B: Heel height, material, buckles/laces aur shape

questions.explanation: Footwear ki heel height, material, buckles/laces aur specific shape ko detail mein dikhana zaroori hai taaki wo garment ke overall look ko complement kare.

questions.question: Ek 'glamorous pose' mein figure ko kaise dikhaya jaata hai?

options.B: Exaggerated, confident aur often dramatic

questions.explanation: Glamorous pose mein figure ko exaggerated, confident aur often dramatic tarike se present kiya jaata hai, jo luxury aur style ko reflect karta hai.

questions.question: Koun sa pose garment ke front details ko best highlight karta hai?

options.B: Straight front view pose

questions.explanation: Straight front view pose garment ke front details jaise neckline, buttons, pockets aur overall silhouette ko clearly highlight karta hai.

questions.question: Ek 'shy mood' dikhane ke liye figure ka pose kaisa hoga?

options.B: Body slightly closed, gaze averted, shoulders hunched

questions.explanation: Shy mood dikhane ke liye body slightly closed, gaze averted aur shoulders thode hunched hote hain.

questions.question: Fashion accessories ka illustration mein kya importance hai?

options.B: Outfit ko complete karna aur personality add karna

questions.explanation: Accessories outfit ko complete karte hain, personality add karte hain aur overall look ko enhance karte hain.

questions.question: Ek 'powerful pose' mein figure ki body language kaisi hoti hai?

options.B: Broad shoulders, open chest, strong stance

questions.explanation: Powerful pose mein figure broad shoulders, open chest aur ek strong, assertive stance ke saath dikhta hai, jo dominance aur strength convey karta hai.

questions.question: Koun sa pose garment ke back details ko best highlight karta hai?

options.B: Back view pose

questions.explanation: Back view pose garment ke back details jaise back necklines, zippers, seams aur pockets ko clearly highlight karta hai.

questions.question: Fashion portfolio ka main purpose kya hai?

options.A: Apne favorite fashion magazines collect karna
options.B: Apne best design work aur skills ko showcase karna

questions.explanation: Fashion portfolio ek collection hota hai apne best design work ka, jise employers ko apni skills aur creativity dikhane ke liye use kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Ek well-organized portfolio mein kya hona chahiye?

options.B: Curated selection of best work, clear presentation aur consistency

questions.explanation: Ek effective portfolio mein apne best aur most relevant works ka curated selection hota hai, jo clear aur consistent tareeke se presented hota hai.

questions.question: Fashion illustration ke liye kaun sa software basic digital illustration ke liye use kiya ja sakta hai?

options.B: Adobe Photoshop / Illustrator

questions.explanation: Adobe Photoshop aur Illustrator industry standard software hain digital fashion illustration ke liye.

questions.question: Apne hand-drawn illustrations ko digitize karne ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Unhe edit, enhance aur digital platforms par share karna

questions.explanation: Digitizing se illustrations ko software mein edit, color correct, enhance aur online share karna easy ho jaata hai.

questions.question: Ek fashion illustrator ke liye 'freelancing' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Sirf ek company ke liye kaam karna
options.B: Multiple clients ke liye independent contractor ke roop mein kaam karna
options.C: Apna khud ka brand launch karna

questions.explanation: Freelancing mein ek illustrator multiple clients ke liye independent contractor ke roop mein kaam karta hai, rather than being a full-time employee.

questions.question: Portfolio mein 'variety' ka kya importance hai?

options.B: Apni versatility aur range of skills dikhana

questions.explanation: Portfolio mein variety dikhane se aapki versatility aur alag-alag styles, mediums aur garment types par kaam karne ki ability show hoti hai.

questions.question: Digital illustration mein 'layers' ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Elements ko independently edit aur manipulate karna

questions.explanation: Layers digital software mein alag-alag elements (figure, garment, background) ko separate rakhte hain, jisse unhe bina doosre elements ko affect kiye edit kiya ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Ek 'mood board' portfolio mein kya value add karta hai?

options.B: Apni inspiration, design process aur aesthetic ko convey karna

questions.explanation: Mood board apni inspiration, design concepts aur aesthetic ko visually communicate karta hai, jo portfolio ko more engaging banata hai.

questions.question: Fashion illustration mein career options kya ho sakte hain?

options.B: Fashion house illustrator, freelance illustrator, textile designer

questions.explanation: Fashion illustration mein career options mein fashion house illustrator, freelance illustrator, textile designer, visual merchandiser aur fashion journalist bhi shamil hain.

questions.question: Apne portfolio ko 'online' present karne ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Global audience aur potential employers tak pahunch banana
options.C: Usse print karna mushkil ho jaata hai

questions.explanation: Online portfolio se aap apne kaam ko global audience aur potential employers tak easily pahuncha sakte hain.

questions.question: Digital illustration mein 'vector graphics' ka kya fayda hai?

options.A: Image pixelate ho jaati hai jab zoom karte hain
options.B: Image quality lose kiye bina scale kar sakte hain
options.C: Sirf low-resolution images ke liye hai
options.D: Sirf black and white images ke liye hai

questions.explanation: Vector graphics (Illustrator jaise software mein) resolution independent hote hain, yaani unhe kitna bhi scale kiya ja sakta hai bina quality loss ke.

questions.question: Portfolio presentation mein 'consistency' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Har page par alag font aur layout use karna
options.B: Throughout the portfolio ek uniform style, layout aur branding maintain karna
options.C: Sirf ek hi color scheme use karna
options.D: Sirf ek hi type ka illustration use karna

questions.explanation: Consistency ka matlab hai portfolio mein ek uniform style, layout, font aur overall branding maintain karna, jo professionalism dikhata hai.

questions.question: Ek fashion illustration portfolio mein 'technical flats' ko include karna kyu important hai?

options.B: Apni garment construction knowledge aur precision dikhane ke liye
options.C: Color mixing skills dikhane ke liye
options.D: Moods aur poses dikhane ke liye

questions.explanation: Technical flats design ki functional aur construction details ko highlight karte hain, jo apki garment construction knowledge aur precision ko demonstrate karta hai.

questions.question: Apne portfolio ko 'customise' karne ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Sirf apne favorite designs include karna
options.B: Har job application ke liye portfolio ko specific requirements ke according adjust karna

questions.explanation: Portfolio ko customize karne ka matlab hai har job application ya client ke specific requirements aur preferences ke according uski content aur order ko adjust karna.

questions.question: Digital illustration mein 'brush settings' ka kya role hai?

options.A: Sirf brush ka color change karna
options.B: Line thickness, opacity, texture aur blend modes ko control karna

questions.explanation: Brush settings artist ko line thickness, opacity, texture, blending modes aur kai doosre parameters ko control karne ki facility dete hain, jisse diverse artistic effects create kiye ja sakte hain.

questions.question: Ek fashion illustration portfolio ko regularly 'update' karna kyu zaroori hai?

options.A: Sirf purane kaam ko rakhne ke liye
options.B: Apni latest skills, style aur growth ko reflect karne ke liye
options.D: Sirf ek baar banane ke liye

questions.explanation: Portfolio ko regularly update karne se aap apni latest skills, current style aur artistic growth ko potential employers aur clients ko dikha sakte hain.
